violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Ceiling vents accumulating dust. Waiting on ladder that is tall enough for employees to clean vents.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee * did not wash hands as necessary. - Employees observed improperly washing hands. Both hand washing sinks were observed to be dry during the inspection. A third employee hand sink that is part of a 4 compartment sink was full of dishes. this part of the sink is for hand washing only. Employees observed not washing hands prior to putting on gloves.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Sani Buckets were at 0ppm
